stories.headline: US, Iran Forces Clash; Trump's 10% Tariffs Deemed Unlawful; Jobs Day | Bloomberg Brief 5/8/2026

A federal trade court declares President Trump's 10% global tariffs unlawful. Veronica Clark of Citi looks ahead to the April payrolls report.  (Source: Bloomberg)
